description: Alice adds Eve as an attendee to the Monday 2 PM planning meeting. No other changes.

events.title: Planning Meeting

mock_llm_response.summary: Added Eve to the Monday planning meeting at 2 PM.

notes: Reference datetime is 2026-02-20 (Friday), so 'Monday' resolves to 2026-02-23. Only attendees change; time and location preserved. calendar_context[0] so existing_event_id=1.
